---
title: "results"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-25"
---
# load library and descriptive

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(psych)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
data <- read.csv("vowel_info.csv")

# Vowel space (F1 x F2) colored by centralization
ggplot(data, aes(x = F2, y = F1, color = factor(centralized_index),
                 shape = vowel_group)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_x_reverse() + scale_y_reverse() +  # phonetic convention
  labs(color = "centralized_index", title = "F1 x F2 vowel space") +
  theme_minimal()

# NH-HL agreement across centralization
ggplot(data, aes(x = centralized_index, y = corr_NH_HL,
                 color = vowel_group)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, alpha = 0.5) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", aes(group = vowel_group), size = 1) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  labs(title = "NH-HL model agreement by centralization") +
  theme_minimal()

# NH vs HL: how each model treats centralization
data %>%
  pivot_longer(c(corr_01_10_NH, corr_01_10_HL),
               names_to = "model", values_to = "corr") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = centralized_index, y = corr,
             color = model, linetype = vowel_group)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", size = 1) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  labs(title = "Each model's correlation with the centralized vowel") +
  theme_minimal()

```
# linear regression

```{r}


# Standardize predictors so coefficients are comparable
data_z <- data %>%
  mutate(across(c(F1, F2, centralized_index), ~ as.numeric(scale(.))))

# Acoustic-only model
m_acoustic <- lmer(corr_01_10_NH ~ F1 + F2 + vowel_group + 
                    (1 | talker), data = data_z, REML = FALSE)
summary(m_acoustic)

# Centralization-only model
m_cent     <- lmer(corr_01_10_NH ~ centralized_index + vowel_group + 
                   (1 | talker), data = data_z, REML = FALSE)
summary(m_cent)

m_full <- lmer(corr_01_10_NH ~ F1 + F2 + centralized_index + vowel_group + 
                               (1 | talker), 
               data = data_z, REML = FALSE)

# Does centralization add anything beyond F1 + F2?
anova(m_acoustic, m_full)

# Do F1 + F2 add anything beyond centralization?
anova(m_cent, m_full)
```





# load vowel data and manipulated continuum data

```{r}

vowels <- tibble(
  sound = c("w01ae", "w01ah", "w01aw", "w01eh", "w01ey", "w01er",
            "w01ih", "w01iy", "w01oa", "w01oo", "w01uh", "w01uw"),
  vowel = c("ae", "ah", "aw", "eh", "ey", "er", "ih", "iy", "oa", "oo", "uh", "uw"),
  example = c("had", "hod/cot", "hawed", "head", "hayed", "heard",
              "hid", "heed", "hoed/boat", "hood", "hud", "who'd"),
  F1 = c(781, 987, 810.564776, 668.285294, 483.36018, 470.6117,
         506.751486, 453.623264, 477.81621, 498.124985, 678.233271, 499.552161),
  F2 = c(1987, 1633, 1246.180661, 2035.199909, 2667.825911, 1387.771585,
         2282.987050, 2804, 1032.641489, 1443.431715, 1673.185366, 1073.305178)
)

central <- tibble(
  label = "central point",
  F1 = 604.2398212,
  F2 = 1725.776529
)


steps <- tibble(
  step = c("Step 1 (aw)", "Step 2", "Step 3", "Step 4", "Step 5 (iy)"),
  step_num = 1:5,
  F1 = c(869.697217, 703.761552, 664.770489, 516.219132, 451.503216),
  F2 = c(1356.959946, 1579.571775, 1988.891228, 2313.128108, 2657.222429),
  correlation = c(0.60857, 0.60643, 0.59117, 0.57313, 0.53402)
)
```


```{r}
p1 <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    data = vowels,
    aes(x = F2, y = F1),
    size = 1
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = vowels,
    aes(x = F2, y = F1, label = vowel),
    nudge_x = 50,
    nudge_y = 25,
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = central,
    aes(x = F2, y = F1),
    shape = 1,
    size = 1,
    stroke = 1.3
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = steps,
    aes(x = F2, y = F1),
    size = 1
  ) +

 # scale_x_reverse() +
#  scale_y_reverse() +
  labs(
    title = "Vowel space",
    x = "F2 (Hz)",
    y = "F1 (Hz)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

p1
```
```{r}
p2 <- ggplot(steps, aes(x = step_num, y = correlation)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(correlation, 3)),
    nudge_y = 0.006,
    size = 4
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = steps$step_num,
    labels = steps$step
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.50, 0.63)) +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "Continuum ",
    y = "l"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1)
  )

p2
```
```{r}
steps_dist <- steps %>%
  mutate(
    distance_from_global_center = sqrt((F1 - central$F1)^2 + (F2 - central$F2)^2))

p4 <- ggplot(steps_dist, aes(x = step_num, y = distance_from_global_center)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(distance_from_global_center, 1)),
    nudge_y = 25,
    size = 4
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = steps$step_num,
    labels = steps$step
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Distance of each continuum step from the global vowel-space center",
    x = "Continuum step",
    y = "Euclidean distance from calculated central point"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1)
  )

p4
```
```{r}
steps
```

```{r}
#plot F1, F2 of continuum steps with vowel space

steps_long <- steps %>%
  select(step, step_num, F1, F2) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(F1, F2),
    names_to = "formant",
    values_to = "formant_value"
  )

ggplot(steps_long, aes(
  x = step_num,
  y = formant_value,
  color = formant,
  group = formant
)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = steps$step_num,
    labels = steps$step
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "F1" = "#D55E00",
      "F2" = "#0072B2"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "F1 and F2 values across continuum steps",
    x = "Continuum step",
    y = "Frequency (Hz)",
    color = "Formant"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
 
```
# visualize correlation

```{r}
ggplot(steps, aes(x = step_num, y = correlation)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(
    #title = "Correlation",
    x = "Continuum step",
    y = "Correlation coefficient "
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c( "F1" = "#D55E00")) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1)
  )
```
# what is driving the correlation

```{r}
steps %<>% 
  mutate(F1F2.contrast = F2-F1) %>%
  mutate(distance.from.global.center = sqrt((F1 - central$F1)^2 + (F2 - central$F2)^2))

model1 <- lm(correlation ~ F1F2.contrast, data = steps)
summary(model1)

model2 <- lm(correlation ~ F1 + F2, data = steps)
summary(model2)

model3 <- lm(correlation ~ distance.from.global.center, data = steps)
summary(model3)

```
